name: postmd-mcp-server
description: PostMD Agent API (/api/agent/v1) over MCP stdio
instructions: PostMD Agent API via MCP. Use postmd_* for PostMD; do not curl the Agent API. Create/update: either pass full Markdown in markdown (postmd_create_document / postmd_update_document) or pass filePath only (postmd_create_document_from_file / postmd_update_document_from_file) so this server reads the file. Paths must exist on the MCP server host.
